headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Humana, Raises Price Target to $350
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Ryan Langston   maintains Humana (NYSE:HUM) with a Hold and raises the price target from $211 to $350.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Humana, Raises Price Target to $415
summary: Truist Securities  analyst David Macdonald   maintains Humana (NYSE:HUM) with a Hold and raises the price target from $320 to $415.
